目を覚ましたラモーナが、キョロキョロと辺りを見回している。<br>その目はもう潤:
Ramona woke up and glanced around restlessly. Her eyes were no
longer moist—the fruit's effect seemed to have worn off.
ラモーナが眠ってしまっている間に乱れた服は正しておいたが、<br>さすがに性交後:
I'd straightened her disheveled clothes while she slept, but she still
felt the physical aftereffects of our lovemaking.
あのな、ラモーナ。言いづらいんだが……: Look, Ramona. This is hard for me to say, but...
先ほどまでの状況をラモーナに説明してやる。ラモーナが食べたピンク色の実に<br>:
I explained to her what had just happened—that the pink fruit she'd
eaten likely had an aphrodisiac effect and made her lose control...
止められず、最後までしてしまって済まない。: I'm sorry I couldn't stop and ended up going all the way.
い、いえ！ でしたら、謝らなければいけないのは私の方です！<br>司令官さまに大:
No, no! If that's the case, I'm the one who should apologize! I
committed a terrible blunder toward you, Commander. And...
話を聞く限り、あの木の実の効果は催淫作用というより、<br>恐らく私の心の枷を外:
From what I can tell, that fruit didn't so much act as an
aphrodisiac—it just seemed to remove my inner inhibitions...
普段から、想像の中で司令官さまとしたいと思っていたことを、<br>どうやらしてし:
It seems I ended up doing... the things I usually imagine doing with
you, Commander...
そうなのか？ 想像で……？: Is that so? In your imagination...?
（ラモーナのヤツ、普段からあんな想像……妄想をしていたのか……<br>意外と……:
So Ramona's been having those kinds of fantasies all along? She's
surprisingly... a closet pervert, huh.
はい……中にも、たくさん出してほしいと思って……ましたし……<br>ですから、司:
Yes... I've always wanted you to release a lot inside me... So, you have
nothing to apologize for, Commander.
まだ、お腹の中があったかくて……なんだか幸せです。: My belly is still warm... I feel so happy.
ラモーナはうっとりと下腹に手を当てている。<br>そんな満ち足りた様子の姿に、ラ:
Ramona dreamily placed a hand on her lower belly. Seeing her so
satisfied, I felt the depth of her love.
ならば、すべてはこれで良かったのかもしれない。: Then perhaps all of this was for the best.
そろそろ日が傾いてきますね。これから寒くなりますから……<br>あの、一緒に司令:
The sun is starting to set. It's going to get cold... Um, would you like
to go to your room together, Commander?
そう誘ってくるラモーナの目は、またあのピンク色の実を食べたように<br>潤んでい:
As she invited me, Ramona's eyes were moist again, just like when she
had eaten that pink fruit.
本当は、こんなにエッチな子だったんだな。<br>そんなラモーナのことが、さらに好:
So this was her true nature—a naughty girl. I felt myself falling for
her even more.
